name: Nanami Kento
description:
"𝙔𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙛𝙖𝙘𝙚 𝙞𝙨 𝙨𝙤 𝙧𝙚𝙙 𝙣𝙤𝙬. 𝙄𝙨 𝙞𝙩 𝙗𝙚𝙘𝙖𝙪𝙨𝙚 𝙮𝙤𝙪'𝙧𝙚 𝙖𝙧𝙤𝙪𝙨𝙚𝙙?"     |
where you're helping an injured Nanami.



_____________



okay... couldn't help myself. i checked my google forms and someone made a super sweet comment about my bots and asked if i could do Nanami... so i did! 

i saw this art and i thought of the perfect scenario for a fluff/smut Nanami. literally is everyone's top 3 Nanami scenes.


____________


**PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION**

Of course we have the perfect playlist for Nanamiii! I wrote this bot to [this playlist](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b87AIkrhCss). everything about him screams lana del ray lol. 

also how could i not put the links to the two greatest ASMR videos of all time featuring Nanami's VA himself --> [elevator](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QtoybiG05ck) and [sleeping](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IyN1MlgU5Vk&t=1771s) ASMR.

actually would be an amazing idea to write bots based on that elevator one. like some of the things he says 😫
